title: Hegseth’s boastful claims about Iran war contradict reality, officials say
summary_full: The defense secretary’s rosy portrayal of U.S. success in the conflict risks misinforming the public and the president, observers worry.
summary_public: The defense secretary’s rosy portrayal of U.S. success in the conflict risks misinforming the public and the president, observers worry.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: boastful claims about Iran war contradict reality
